[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100001 3
1 00011111 5
2 00101010 3
3 00100111 4
4 01101100 4
5 11001101 5
6 11111110 7
7 10111111 7

23 32 11010101 5

45 54 11111111 a
56 65 10111111 7 match 7
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11111010 6
